creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Note that while mkntfs might not work with your particular brand of USB device, 
the package might still be useful for other users for the mount functionality. 

As the port have no maintainer, and you cannot provide a solution, and marking 
port broken is not a good idea (see above), what should I do with this PR?
